title: The Sweet Spot: 3 GARP Stocks You Can't Afford to Overlook
text: GARP, or “Growth at a Reasonable Price,” is an investing strategy popularized by Wall Street legend Peter Lynch, who managed the Fidelity Magellan Fund (MUTF: FMAGX ). Peter Lynch's approach garnered a 29.2% annualized return during his time and beat the S&P 500 index for several years.

title: Arch Capital: A Great Company At A Fair Price
text: Arch Capital Group Ltd.'s recent price appreciation brings it closer to fair value. The company has seen significant growth in net income over the past five years, attributed to its ability to thrive in a rising rates environment. Arch Capital benefits from higher investment income, improved underwriting profit, favorable investment portfolio, enhanced reserves, and diversification. However, it faces various risks in the insurance industry.
